src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated legacy MongoClient with the modern synchronous driver API (MongoClients) to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and current driver versions.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: import com.mongodb.client.MongoClient; import com.mongodb.client.MongoClients; ... client = MongoClients.create(clientSettings);

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Update connection string handling from MongoClientURI to ConnectionString to align with the new driver API.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: import com.mongodb.ConnectionString; ... ConnectionString connectionString = new ConnectionString(MONGO_URI);

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Refactor codec registration to use the new CodecRegistry builder pattern required by the modern driver.

src/main/User/User.java.general_idea: Expand the User class to include comprehensive personal and account details.
src/main/User/User.java.human_impl: private String firstName; private String lastName; ... private ObjectId id;

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
Add JAXB API dependency required because it was removed from the JDK module system in Java 11.
Add JavaMail API dependency required because it was removed from the JDK module system in Java 11.
